================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 0F 7F 7D DF ED
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1882
Reflected CC   : 0x00
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 14

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1882
ReflectedCC  : 0x00
PayloadLen   : 14
payload_valid=1

[BEE1012 MEOW]
return_data (14 bytes):
  [000] = 0x59 (89)
  [001] = 0x6F (111)
  [002] = 0x73 (115)
  [003] = 0x69 (105)
  [004] = 0x20 (32)
  [005] = 0x49 (73)
  [006] = 0x6E (110)
  [007] = 0x20 (32)
  [008] = 0x53 (83)
  [009] = 0x70 (112)
  [010] = 0x61 (97)
  [011] = 0x63 (99)
  [012] = 0x65 (101)
  [013] = 0x00 (0)

[PAYLOAD HEX]
59 6F 73 69 20 49 6E 20 53 70 61 63 65 00 

[RETURN VALUE]
59 6F 73 69 20 49 6E 20 53 70 61 63 65 00 

[BINARY DATA]
